content: Supabase free tier pauses after 7 days of inactivity — dashboard visits do NOT count, only actual database queries. On pause, compute shuts down and cold-start takes ~30s. Data is preserved. Keep-alive strategies: GitHub Actions cron hitting a lightweight DB query every 2-3 days; or Vercel Cron job calling a health endpoint. Community tooling exists (supabase-pause-prevention). Shared demos have been silently killed during quiet periods.
